content: One paper related to **Multimodal Cloud Removal** has been accepted by **ISPRS J PRS**.
content_zh: 一篇关于 **多模态去云** 的论文被 **ISPRS J PRS** 录用。

content: One paper related to **Multimodal Unified Framework** has been accepted by **IGARSS 2026**.
content_zh: 一篇关于 **多模态统一框架** 的论文被 **IGARSS 2026** 录用。

content: One co-authored paper has been accepted by **ISPRS Congress 2026**.
content_zh: 一篇合著论文被 **ISPRS 2026** 录用。

content: I began my **Master**'s degree studies at **Wuhan University**.
content_zh: 我开始在 **武汉大学** 攻读 **硕士** 学位。

content: One paper related to **Time Series Reconstruction** has been accepted by **IEEE TGRS**.
content_zh: 一篇关于 **时序图像重建** 的论文被 **IEEE TGRS** 录用。

content: We won the **Grand Prize (Top 0.1%)** and **20,000 RMB** cash in the **12th "Teddy Cup" Data Mining Challenge** [[link]](https://www.tipdm.org/dsej12/2429.jhtml).
content_zh: 我们在第12届**“泰迪杯”数据挖掘挑战赛**中获得**特等奖 (Top 0.1%)** 及 **2万元**奖金 [[link]](https://www.tipdm.org/dsej12/2429.jhtml)。
